name: ExtensionTransport_PartOf
title: R5: Part of referenced event (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Transport.partOf` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Transport.partOf` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Transport)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `Transport.partOf` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Transport)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Transport.partOf` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Transport` is not mapped.
Element `Transport.partOf` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.comment:
Element `Transport.partOf` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Transport` is not mapped.
Element `Transport.partOf` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
Not to be used to link an event to an Encounter - use Event.context for that.[The allowed reference resources may be adjusted as appropriate for the event resource].

element.definition: A larger event of which this particular event is a component or step.
element.comment: Not to be used to link an event to an Encounter - use Event.context for that.[The allowed reference resources may be adjusted as appropriate for the event resource].
